name: Bacon Supper Snack
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter and gently fry mushrooms for 2 minutes.
2. Combine with breadcrumbs, salt, pepper, and herbs.
3. Use just sufficient beaten egg to bind - about 3 tablespoons.
4. Divide stuffing between bacon slices. Roll up and secure each, if necessary, with a wooden cocktail stick.
5. Cook for 5 minutes under a hot grill, turning once. Remove sticks and place bacon rolls in an oven dish, in a single layer.
6. Press tomatoes through a sieve into a saucepan. Season to taste and bring to the boil.
7. Pour oven-baked bacon rolls into the saucepan and cook in a very moderate oven (350°F - gas mark 3) for 30 minutes.
8. Serve with creamed potatoes and, if liked, a tossed green salad.
